$comment: Phase 10.6 (PHASE_10_LAUNCH_PLAN.md) - Lighthouse CI config for the public-launch perf budget. Run via `npx @lhci/cli autorun` after `npm run build && npm run start`. The throttling profile mirrors a mid-tier SA mobile device on Slow 3G to honor the No-Flash Rule from TO_START_EVERY_SESSION.md.

collect.$comment: Routes the operator-facing audit hits. Locale prefix omitted - LHCI follows the default locale (en) via the `localePrefix: 'as-needed'` routing posture.

settings.$comment: Slow 3G + mid-tier CPU. The plan calls for Slow 4G + Slow 3G; this config holds Slow 3G as the floor. Operators wanting Slow 4G can pass --preset=desktop or edit throttling here.
settings.$skipAudits_comment: Skip the inapplicable ones for an auth-gated, locale-routed app. is-on-https is dev-only false; uses-http2 isn't actionable from app code.

assert.$comment: Phase 10.6 floors per PHASE_10_LAUNCH_PLAN.md task 10.6. Performance is the strictest; SEO is auth-gated for most surfaces so the floor is per-route.

assertions.$comment_metric_budgets: JS budget posture - lhci will fail builds that ship more JS than the plan allows on key routes. ~150KB matches the No-Flash budget. The metrics-budget assertion is enforced via budgets.json (see ./lighthouse-budgets.json).

upload.$comment: Default to temporary public storage for development runs. Set LHCI_TOKEN + LHCI_SERVER_BASE_URL in CI to push to a self-hosted server.
